author: Haniewicz
description: Synchronize an Obsidian vault with a private server. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Haniewicz
manifest.description: Synchronize a vault with a private server.
manifest.name: Private Sync

name: Private Sync

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Private Sync Plugin 1.0.2

Submission fixes:
- Replace builtin-modules with Node builtinModules from node:module.
- Remove plugin ID prefix from command IDs.
- Mark intentionally ignored promises with void and add rejection-safe handlers.
- Use activeDocument for visibility checks.
- Tighten unsafe error/member access and request/index typing.
- Remove redundant union members and unused authenticated binding.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Private Sync Plugin 1.0.1

Submission fixes:
- Add MIT LICENSE file.
- Remove the redundant word Obsidian from manifest description.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Private Sync Plugin 1.0.0

Highlights:
- Private backend synchronization for Obsidian vaults.
- Multi-device pairing with approval requests and recovery pairing codes.
- Multiple server vaults with safe linking assessment.
- Batch sync, conflict handling, history, large file chunking, and mobile-aware lifecycle sync.
- Optional selected Obsidian settings sync.
- Community plugin catalog with server-side JSON settings sync.
- Client-side note encryption support and encryption key metadata.

Backend repository: https://github.com/Haniewicz/PrivateSyncServer

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Refresh community plugin action state after Enable/Disable so Disable changes to Enable immediately.
- Show a clearer error for invalid or expired recovery pairing codes.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.47

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Simplify encryption settings to one vault passphrase field for setup/unlock.
- Save the passphrase locally after successful use when the remember option is enabled.
- Move encryption passphrase changes into a confirmation modal with repeated new passphrase.
- Detect legacy downloaded encrypted markdown and queue it for decrypted replacement after unlock.
releases.name: Private Sync v0.1.0-dev0.43

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Stop retrying uploads for paths already blocked by pending conflicts.
- Limit passphrase rotation reuploads to files already encrypted on the server.
- Try the local remembered passphrase before prompting for older encrypted history revisions.
- Add conflict dismiss actions and aggregate repeated conflict resolution notices.
releases.name: Private Sync v0.1.0-dev0.42

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Add server-backed encryption key rotation metadata.
- Re-upload active encrypted files after passphrase rotation.
- Support one-time old passphrase prompts for encrypted history.
- Add plaintext history encryption action.

Verification:
- Plugin: npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build
- Server: npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build
releases.name: Private Sync v0.1.0-dev0.41

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Exclude Private Sync itself from community plugin pseudo-sync.
- Show Enable/Disable and Uninstall actions for locally installed community plugins.
- Rename plugin settings action to Apply Server Settings.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.46

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Treat encrypted ghost notes as pending downloads instead of local edits.
- Retry encrypted placeholder downloads after unlocking encryption.
- Queue a follow-up sync when unlock happens during an active sync.

Verification:
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
releases.name: Private Sync v0.1.0-dev0.40

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease: encrypted markdown files without an unlocked passphrase now appear locally as placeholder notes and are replaced with decrypted content after unlock. Also keeps sync moving for unrelated files.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.39

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease: marked notes stay readable locally and are encrypted only before upload; adds Obsidian SecretStorage option for remembering the encryption passphrase locally. Requires Obsidian 1.11.4+.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease with whole-note body encryption commands and frontmatter auto-encryption support. Adds tests for note body encryption helpers.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.37

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease with client-side encryption for synced files, encrypted text fragment commands, plaintext metadata support, and crypto helper tests.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Fixes:
- Keep the active server vault name in sync after rename.
- Show the cached vault name in status and settings.
- Refresh the cached vault name from vault lists and vault update events.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Add Vaults tab with vault rename and guarded delete flow.
- Show assigned server vault in the Devices view.

releases.author: Haniewicz

Dev release.

Changes:

- Keep staging cleanup automatic after committed batches on the server.
- Add plugin UI consistency/overflow guidance.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Stabilize per-fragment conflict choice button layout under each diff fragment.
- Color Local and Server fragment choice buttons to match their diff panes.

Validation:

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:

Validation:

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Show one selectable row per pending server conflict, even when multiple conflicts target the same file.
- Resolve only the selected conflict ID instead of resolving every pending conflict for the file path.
- Keep the local file marked as conflicted when additional pending conflicts remain for the same path.

Validation:

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Improve conflict diff view to show only conflicting fragments.
- Render local and server conflict fragments side by side with line numbers and color distinction.

Validation:
- npm run build
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.29

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Fix text conflict auto-merge so conflicting local/server edits stay as conflicts instead of appending local-only lines to the server version.
- Keep automatic resolution only for clean three-way text merges.

Validation:
- npm run build
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.28

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.
- Coalesces pull catch-up changes per path so devices apply the latest remote state once instead of replaying intermediate revisions.
- Adds three-way text merge for local-vs-remote Markdown/text changes using the last synced revision as base.
- Auto-uploads clean text merges and writes conflict markers only around overlapping hunks when manual resolution is needed.
- Backup rollback tag: backup-before-coalesced-pull-20260709.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.27

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease: fix sidebar text wrapping regression and add expandable ignored-file list in Status.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.26

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease: improve sidebar wrapping, add detailed event/error log preview and clearing, and explain ignored status in the panel.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.25

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease: sync local device name to the server, refresh clients on device updates, and pair with server cleanup for deleted-device conflicts.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.24

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease. Fixes sync after create-then-delete history by downloading change contents from the exact file revision instead of the current path endpoint.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.23

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease. Adds bulk conflict selection/actions, semantic button styling, and fixes downloaded note creation so normal vault folders are created through the Vault API.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.22

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

- Avoids applying a device's own uploaded change back onto the active local file.
- Preserves unindexed local edits by marking a conflict instead of overwriting the file.
- Uses server-provided change author metadata to reduce sync echo races.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.9

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

- Adds approval modal and Requests panel for pending device pairing requests.
- Polls pending pairing requests so newly approved devices can receive their token.
- Adds API support for approved pairing request status.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.8

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

- Clarifies repository branch/release instructions for plugin work.
- Bumps plugin dev version metadata to 0.1.0-dev0.7.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.7

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Recompute queued file hashes from the exact content snapshot that is uploaded.
- Keep batch metadata in sync with uploaded content to prevent chunked upload hash mismatches.
- Handle empty files as a single empty chunk instead of sending totalChunks=0.

Install/update:
- Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from this release.
- Replace the files in your Obsidian vault plugin folder and reload Obsidian.
releases.name: Private Sync 0.1.0-dev0.6

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Fix chunked upload binary content type so server-side hash verification matches uploaded chunks.

Install/update:
- Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from this release.
- Replace the files in your Obsidian vault plugin folder and reload Obsidian.
releases.name: Private Sync 0.1.0-dev0.5

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease. Narrows Obsidian settings sync to note creator settings only and makes community plugin sync merge by plugin ID without replacing matching plugins.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.21

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease. Fixes Obsidian settings and community plugin sync by scanning Vault.configDir through Obsidian's data adapter, and enables settings/community plugin sync by default while keeping remote plugin replacement opt-in.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.20

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease. Adds optional sync for selected Obsidian settings and community plugin folders, with same-plugin folders skipped unless explicitly replacing remote plugins during Local -> Remote.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.19

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Dev prerelease. Locks each local Obsidian vault to one server vault and moves first-link safety decisions into the initial pairing flow.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.18

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Add safe vault connection assessment before switching server vaults.
- Add local vault identity and cautious connection state that blocks auto sync until the user chooses a reconciliation action.
- Add explicit pending connection actions: download remote, upload local, normal sync, or cancel.
- Record sync-state after completed syncs for future risk assessment.

Build/audit:
- npm run build passes.
- Obsidian release checklist reviewed against official docs: manifest fields, release assets, no tracked main.js, requestUrl for HTTP, no default hotkeys, no hardcoded .obsidian path in code, no Node/Electron top-level APIs for mobile, and lockfile committed.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.17

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

Changes:
- Add server vault selection in plugin settings.
- Add server vault creation from paired plugin clients.
- Reset the local sync index when switching server vaults to avoid mixing revisions.

Build/audit:
- npm run build passes.
- Obsidian release checklist reviewed for manifest fields, release assets, mobile-safe requestUrl usage, no default hotkeys, no hardcoded .obsidian path in code, and no tracked main.js.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.16

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.
- Clears stale local conflict states after a resolved auto-merge when the server no longer has a pending conflict.
- Treats all queued operations for the same path as resolved when one auto-merge succeeds.
- Coalesces queued operations per path to prevent repeated local conflict entries.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.15

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.
- Fixes daily-note auto-merge when the phone widget produces a stale text update instead of a clean create.
- Prevents synced deleted files from being queued for delete again.
- Auto-resolves delete conflicts when the server already has the file deleted.
- Keeps real delete-vs-edit conflicts manual to avoid data loss.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.14

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.
- Auto-merges safe duplicate note conflicts by keeping the server version and appending unique local lines.
- Adds local sync event history with an Events tab.
- Records auto-merge, conflict, manual resolution, offline, and error events.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.13

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

- Adds conflict diff preview comparing local and server content.
- Adds device restore and permanent delete actions alongside revoke.
- Adds history preview and restore for specific file revisions.
- Adds GUI handling for pending decision requests such as mass delete and suspicious operation approvals.
- Adds text preview modal for diffs, request details, and file revisions.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.12

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

- Adds conflict management actions in the Private Sync panel: Keep local and Use server.
- Shows remote pending conflicts across devices.
- Adds readable connected devices management with revoke.
- Adds file history lookup by path or active file.
- Adds API calls for conflicts, history, and device revoke.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.11

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Dev prerelease.

- Suppresses repeated sync connection errors while the device is offline.
- Shows one offline notice per offline period: Jesteś offline. Dane nie są synchronizowane.
- Adds a Private Sync status bar indicator that switches between online and offline icons.
releases.name: 0.1.0-dev0.10
